if(USE_OPENCL OR USE_OPENCL_CPP)
    message(STATUS "deep_learning_inference: OpenCL backend not implemented, skipping")
else()
    set_source_files_properties(
        cuda/dnn_inference.cpp
        cuda/dnn_inference_optimized.cpp
        main.cpp
        PROPERTIES LANGUAGE CUDA
    )

    add_executable(deep_learning_inference
        main.cpp
        cuda/dnn_inference.cpp
        cuda/dnn_inference_optimized.cpp
    )

    target_link_libraries(deep_learning_inference PRIVATE cuda_helpers)

    # Point to the weights file generated by generate_weights.py.
    # Run:  python source/deep_learning_inference/generate_weights.py
    target_compile_definitions(deep_learning_inference PRIVATE
        "WEIGHTS_PATH=\"${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/weights.bin\""
    )

    # Fast math in release builds; debug info for profiling
    target_compile_options(deep_learning_inference PRIVATE
        "$<$<AND:$<CONFIG:Release>,$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CUDA>>:-use_fast_math;-lineinfo>"
        "$<$<AND:$<CONFIG:Debug>,$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CUDA>>:-G;-src-in-ptx>"
    )
endif()
